trivia: Bombardier's flagship flies farther than any business jet before it: 7,700 nautical miles, four cabin zones and a full bedroom. It routinely appears at extreme range from anywhere.
Ultra-long-range corporate jets produce wonderfully weird ADS-B geometry: nonstop tracks between cities no airline connects.
funFacts: Holds the record for the longest-range purpose-built business jet.
GE Passport engines were developed specifically for it.
